7.question: 找出客单价在500到2000之间、25-34岁或35-44岁女性用户的已完成订单

runs.sql:
WITH user_avg_order AS (
  SELECT dwd_order_detail.user_id, AVG(dwd_order_detail.total_amount) AS avg_order_amount
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
  WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成' AND dim_user.gender = 'female' AND (dim_user.age_group = '25-34' OR dim_user.age_group = '35-44')
  GROUP BY dwd_order_detail.user_id
)
SELECT dwd_order_detail.order_id, dwd_order_detail.user_id, dim_user.user_name, dim_user.age_group, dwd_order_detail.order_dt, dwd_order_detail.total_amount, user_avg_order.avg_order_amount
FROM dwd_order_detail
INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
INNER JOIN user_avg_order ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = user_avg_order.user_id
WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成' AND dim_user.gender = 'female' AND (dim_user.age_group = '25-34' OR dim_user.age_group = '35-44') AND user_avg_order.avg_order_amount >= 500 AND user_avg_order.avg_order_amount <= 2000
ORDER BY dwd_order_detail.order_dt DESC

SELECT dwd_order_detail.order_id, dim_user.user_name, dim_user.age_group, dwd_order_detail.total_amount, dwd_order_detail.order_dt
FROM dwd_order_detail
INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成' AND dwd_order_detail.total_amount BETWEEN 500 AND 2000 AND dim_user.gender = 'female' AND (dim_user.age_group = '25-34' OR dim_user.age_group = '35-44')
ORDER BY dwd_order_detail.total_amount DESC

WITH qualified_users AS (
  SELECT dim_user.user_id, AVG(dwd_order_detail.total_amount) AS avg_order_value
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
  WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成' AND dim_user.gender = 'female' AND (dim_user.age_group = '25-34' OR dim_user.age_group = '35-44')
  GROUP BY dim_user.user_id
)
SELECT dwd_order_detail.order_id, dim_user.user_name, dim_user.age_group, dwd_order_detail.order_dt, dwd_order_detail.total_amount, qualified_users.avg_order_value
FROM dwd_order_detail
INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
INNER JOIN qualified_users ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = qualified_users.user_id
WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成' AND qualified_users.avg_order_value >= 500 AND qualified_users.avg_order_value <= 2000
ORDER BY dwd_order_detail.order_dt DESC

  WHERE dwd_cart_detail.action_type = 'add' AND dwd_cart_detail.action_dt >= DATE('now','-30 days')
  GROUP BY dwd_cart_detail.user_id
),
refund_stats AS (
  SELECT dwd_refund_detail.user_id, COUNT(*) AS refund_count
  FROM dwd_refund_detail
  WHERE dwd_refund_detail.apply_dt >= DATE('now','-30 days')
  GROUP BY dwd_refund_detail.user_id
)
SELECT user_name, cart_stats.cart_count, refund_stats.refund_count
FROM cart_stats
INNER JOIN refund_stats ON cart_stats.user_id = refund_stats.user_id
INNER JOIN dim_user ON cart_stats.user_id = dim_user.user_id
